summary: Implements mors doctor with 6 diagnostic checks (node_version, sqlcipher, init, device_keys, auth_session, relay_config), each producing pass/fail/warn with copy/paste remediation commands. Covers VAL-LAUNCH-008.

strengths: Each check has clear name, status, message, and remediation fields
Two-tier severity: fail (hard gate, exit 1) vs warn (informational, exit 0)
Remediation commands are specific and copy/paste ready (e.g., 'brew install sqlcipher && npm rebuild')
JSON output is well-structured with status, checks array, and configDir
Human-readable mode uses ✓/✗/⚠ indicators with inline remediation

testCoverage.notes: 506 lines across 26+ test cases covering: healthy environment, per-check validation, failure detection with remediation, simulated sqlcipher failure, auth/relay warn states, multiple failures, human-readable output, help integration, determinism and automation
